definition_en: A number expressed as one quantity divided by another
example: One half is a fraction written as 1/2.

definition_en: A proportion expressed as a number out of 100
example: Sixty percent of students passed the exam.

definition_en: A straight line from one side of a circle to the other through the centre
example: The diameter of the circle is 10 cm.

definition_en: The distance around the outside of a circle
example: Calculate the circumference using pi times the diameter.

definition_en: A mathematical statement that two expressions are equal
example: Solve the equation to find the value of x.

definition_en: A symbol representing an unknown or changeable quantity
example: In the equation, x is the variable.

definition_en: The quality of being made up of exactly similar parts
example: A square has four lines of symmetry.

definition_en: The amount of space a three-dimensional object occupies
example: Calculate the volume of the box.

definition_en: The likelihood that something will happen, expressed as a number
example: The probability of rolling a six is one in six.

definition_en: An approximate calculation of a value or quantity
example: I estimate the journey will take about two hours.

definition_en: The comparison of two quantities expressed as a fraction or with a colon
example: The ratio of boys to girls in the class is 3:2.

definition_en: To find a result using mathematics
example: Calculate the area of the triangle.

definition_en: At a right angle (90 degrees) to a line or surface
example: The two lines are perpendicular to each other.

definition_en: A number expressed using a dot to separate whole numbers from fractions
example: 3.14 is the decimal approximation of pi.

definition_en: A system of measurement based on multiples of ten
example: Most countries use the metric system.

definition_en: A number which, when multiplied by itself, gives the original number
example: The square root of 16 is 4.

definition_en: A diagram showing the relationship between two sets of numbers
example: The graph shows sales data over 12 months.

definition_en: The average value calculated by dividing the sum by the count
example: The mean of 4, 6 and 8 is 6.

definition_en: A number less than zero
example: Minus 5 is a negative number.

definition_en: A branch of maths using letters and symbols to represent numbers
example: Algebra is taught in most secondary schools.
